name: foundry
description: Build-verify-fix loop for Claude Code. V3 flow-reversal architecture (plugin v4.0.0): brownfield runs use grounded flow graphs + node-by-node deltas instead of end-state specs. v4.1.0 teammate upgrade: methodical deliberation procedures (read floor, approach deliberation, blast radius, competing hypotheses) replace anti-depth guards — tuned for correctness over wall-clock speed. Greenfield/cosmetic runs unchanged. 5-stream verification (TRACE, FLOW_TRACE, PROVE, SIGHT, TEST). Forge plans. Foundry builds.
